definitions: A network of four art museums in the United Kingdom: Tate Britain, Tate Modern, Tate Liverpool, and Tate St Ives.
The original art gallery established by Sir Henry Tate, now known as Tate Britain, housing a collection of British art from 1500 to the present day.
examples: We spent the afternoon at The Tate Gallery, admiring the Pre-Raphaelite collection.
The Tate Gallery has expanded significantly over the years, now encompassing multiple sites.
Many tourists visit The Tate Gallery to see its renowned modern art exhibitions.
